title: join-manifest.json — the frameId↔stateId↔cmpCapture join (the §9.1 identity spine)
description: One row per authored design frame. cmpCapture is DERIVED from stateId (config.captureDeriveRule); a hardcoded mismatch FAILS the lint, so a crossed row is structurally impossible. designContentHash 'auto' is stamped by lint from the live render's pull-manifest (revision pinning).

stateId.description: The single key shared across frame metadata, this row, the app's UiState member, the subject (self-regression) capture name, and the coverage list.

module.description: CMP feature-module id (matches a config.modules entry).

cmpCapture.description: Always 'DERIVED' (or the exact derived path). Anything else FAILS the miswire check.

designContentHash.description: 'auto' to stamp from the live render; a pinned sha256 to detect re-authoring drift.
